gates.finding: The seeded run plays attack cards within the energy budget and reaches a win when enemy hp reaches zero.
An identical seed and action sequence reproduce the same runtime replay-state digest; a different seed diverges.
The probe exposes deck, hand, discard, relics, and enemy run state as read-only inspection evidence; no rendered-visual or production claim is made.
Scenario expectations cover the deterministic opening hand, the win/survival outcome, and same-seed/different-seed digest behavior.

trustedValidationRef: cargo test deck_roguelike_game_class_contract && cargo test deck_roguelike_demo_contract
boundary: Fixture-scoped verdict shape; no production-readiness claim.
